task_completion.description: Load the Breast Cancer dataset and open the Decision Tree classification module in JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP window is open showing the BreastCancer dataset, and the Decision Tree classification analysis panel is visible.

task_completion.description: Set 'Diagnosis' as the target variable and the 30 numeric variables as predictors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP Decision Tree panel, 'Diagnosis' is placed in the 'Target' box, and the other numeric variables are in the 'Predictors' box.

task_completion.description: Set training data to 80%, seed to 123, and maximum depth to 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP Decision Tree options, 'Training Data' proportion is set to 0.8 (or 80%), 'Set seed' is checked with the value 123, and 'Max depth' is set to 4.

task_completion.description: Generate the decision tree plot in JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual decision tree plot is displayed in the JASP results panel on the right.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP project as cancer_tree.jasp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window title shows 'cancer_tree.jasp' or a file manager/terminal shows the file 'cancer_tree.jasp' in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/.

task_completion.description: Record the Test Accuracy and Root Split Variable in tree_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the contents of 'tree_report.txt' containing a Test Accuracy value and a Root Split Variable.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP graphical interface to configure and train the model, rather than just running a Python/R script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The results in the text file match the output in JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The accuracy and root split variable recorded in the text file correspond to the actual results shown in the JASP results panel.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply echo guessed answers into the text file without running the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual evidence of the agent actually running the Decision Tree model in JASP and viewing the results before creating the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Test Accuracy should be approximately 0.93 (must be between 0.85 and 1.0). The expected Root Split Variable should be one of the following: PerimeterWorst, PointsMean, ConcavePointsMean, RadiusWorst, or PointsWorst (most likely PerimeterWorst given seed 123 and max depth 4).
